rationale: LCC drops 1167 nodes (0.61%) and 1086 edges (0.005%). Composition is not benign: 982 DRG (5.86% of all drugs), 164 PHE (all 164 meddra-prefixed), 15 DIS, 6 EXP. No ontology-backed types are dropped. Using LCC would silently remove ~6% of the candidate drug space before A4. Full costs 0.1MB and forces those nodes to be excluded explicitly, with counts, at A6/A7 rather than vanishing upstream.
note: Frozen. Do not revisit; a moving graph variant makes all downstream numbers incomparable.
